changelog: Audited and fixed 54 search queries across 38 languages
searchFresh(): THIS_WEEK with THIS_MONTH fallback on all search paths
Language discovery: stop word search for diverse fresh content
Trending tab: kworb-only (removed fake search trending)
YouTube Charts: official trending/top/songs per country
Duration badge on all video sources
Exploration pool: movies, travel, knowledge (45 languages)
QR code sign-in: vertical layout, soft background
SplashActivity prewarm for faster cold start
Update system: points to e1ch/SmartTube releases
changelog_zh: 審查並修正 38 種語言共 54 個搜尋查詢
searchFresh()：本週+本月 fallback 確保新鮮內容
語言探索：停用詞搜尋取得多元新影片
熱門 Tab：僅 kworb 真實資料
排名引擎：類型/頻道多樣性評分
YouTube 官方排行榜：依國家顯示熱門/排行/歌曲
影片長度 badge 顯示在所有來源
探索池：電影、旅遊、知識（45 種語言）
